text: The image shows a white dog resting on the street. It appears completely healthy and shows no signs of injury or distress.
A brown cat is sitting on a wall. It looks well-fed and healthy. There are no visible wounds.
The cow is standing peacefully. It has an old scar on its side but is not bleeding. No urgent care needed.
A monkey is eating a banana. It has a minor patch of missing hair but otherwise looks fine.
The dog is sleeping in the shade. No visible injuries. Condition is stable.
A black crow is perched on a wire. It appears to be resting and in good health.
The cat is grooming itself. No signs of infection or trauma.
A healthy-looking stray dog walking normally down the pavement.
The cow is eating grass. It has no physical deformities or wounds.
A monkey jumping between trees, highly active, no injuries detected.
The dog has a small wound on its paw. It is slightly limping but can still walk. It appears to be in a low severity category.
A cat with a minor skin disease or mild rash on its back. Not bleeding, but looks uncomfortable.
The cow has a small cut near its hoof. Mild distress is visible.
There is a monkey with a superficial scratch on its arm.
A stray dog with minor hair loss and a small scab on its ear.
The bird has a slightly bent feather and is hopping, but doesn't seem critically injured.

The image shows a white cat with a visible injury on its head. The cat appears to be in a low severity category, as it is resting and not showing any signs of distress or pain. The injury is described as a small wound, but it is not clear if it is a burn or a cut.
A dog with a mild limp in its front right leg.
A cow looking slightly undernourished with a small abrasion.
A cat with a minor scrape on its nose.
The dog has a moderate open wound on its side. It is unable to use one leg properly.
A cat suffering from a severe eye infection. There is heavy discharge and it cannot open its left eye.
The cow has a moderately large cut that seems infected. It looks distressed and is lying down.
A monkey with a visibly broken finger and some bleeding.
The stray dog has a significant skin infection covering a large part of its body.
A cat is crying and holding its paw up, unable to walk on it.
A bird with a damaged wing, unable to fly but still able to walk.
The dog has a medium-sized laceration on its back.
A cow with an infected swelling on its neck.
A cat with a moderate burn on its tail.
The dog has a large, deep open wound on its torso. It is bleeding heavily.
A cat has suffered a severe burn covering half of its body. It is in visible agony.
The cow has a deep gash on its leg, possibly from barbed wire, with significant tissue exposure.
A monkey with a crushed limb, bleeding moderately.
The stray dog is lying on the road with an exposed bone fracture in its hind leg.
A dog with a massive open maggot wound on its head.
The cat's leg is completely mangled and bleeding profusely.
A cow with a large tear in its abdomen.
The bird has a completely severed wing.
A dog with a severe, deep puncture wound that is actively bleeding.
The dog has just been hit by a vehicle. It is lying motionless on the road in a pool of blood.
A cat is unconscious and breathing very heavily after a severe trauma.
The cow has collapsed on the highway after a road accident. It is bleeding out rapidly.
A monkey is unresponsive with a massive head injury.
The stray dog has multiple severe fractures and is completely paralyzed.
A massive hemorrhage on a dog hit by a car, it is not moving.
A cat lying in a pool of blood, unconscious, appearing dead or dying.
The cow has its intestines exposed after a violent collision.
A bird that has been crushed and is barely breathing.
A dog that is completely unresponsive and bleeding out from the neck.
